tasks.subject: Task 0: tools/cli-smoke 스캐폴드
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 독립 TypeScript 모듈 스캐폴드 + vitest include + tsx 실행 가능

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/{package.json,tsconfig.json,README.md,src/index.ts}, package.json (root), vitest.config.ts, .gitignore

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/package.json","tools/cli-smoke/tsconfig.json","tools/cli-smoke/README.md","tools/cli-smoke/src/index.ts","package.json","vitest.config.ts",".gitignore"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test","acceptanceCriteria":["smoke:test 스크립트 존재","tsx 실행 성공","tsconfig가 루트 extends"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: 공용 타입 정의
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Project/ProjectPaths/PermissionMode/CliKind zod 스키마 + 타입.

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/types.ts

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit -p tools/cli-smoke/tsconfig.json`

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/types.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx tsc --noEmit -p tools/cli-smoke/tsconfig.json","acceptanceCriteria":["zod 스키마와 타입 공존","enum 리터럴 일관"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: resolveProjectPaths() + 단위 테스트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §4.2.1 단일 경로 결정. new/imported/external.

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/resolve-project-paths.ts, __tests__/resolve-project-paths.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test -- resolve-project-paths` (5 tests)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/resolve-project-paths.ts","tools/cli-smoke/__tests__/resolve-project-paths.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test -- resolve-project-paths","acceptanceCriteria":["new/imported spawnCwd=projectDir","external spawnCwd=projectDir/link","external externalLink 없으면 throw"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: PathGuard — isPathWithin + realpath
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §7.6.4 path-guard. traversal/symlink escape 차단.

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/path-guard.ts, __tests__/path-guard.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test -- path-guard` (6 tests)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/path-guard.ts","tools/cli-smoke/__tests__/path-guard.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test -- path-guard","acceptanceCriteria":["루트 하위/자체 true","traversal false","symlink escape false","존재하지 않는 경로 처리"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Junction 유틸 (Win/POSIX)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** createLink/removeLink/resolveLink — Windows mklink /J + POSIX symlink.

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/junction.ts, __tests__/junction.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test -- junction` (3 tests)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/junction.ts","tools/cli-smoke/__tests__/junction.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test -- junction","acceptanceCriteria":["createLink 크로스 OS","resolveLink realpath","removeLink safe"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: ArenaRootService
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ArenaRoot 초기화 + consensus/projects/db/logs idempotent.

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/arena-root.ts, __tests__/arena-root.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test -- arena-root` (4 tests)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/arena-root.ts","tools/cli-smoke/__tests__/arena-root.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test -- arena-root","acceptanceCriteria":["4개 하위 디렉토리 생성","idempotent","루트가 파일이면 throw"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: ProjectService.createNewProject
tasks.description:
**Goal:** new kind 프로젝트 생성. 폴더 + .arena/meta.json.

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/project-service.ts, __tests__/project-service.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test -- project-service` (3 tests)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/project-service.ts","tools/cli-smoke/__tests__/project-service.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test -- project-service","acceptanceCriteria":["폴더+meta.json 생성","중복 slug throw","slug 스키마 검증"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: ProjectService.linkExternal + importProject
tasks.description:
**Goal:** external(junction + realpath) / imported(복사). external+auto 금지.

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/project-service.ts, __tests__/project-service.test.ts (수정)

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test -- project-service` (8 tests)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/project-service.ts","tools/cli-smoke/__tests__/project-service.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test -- project-service","acceptanceCriteria":["linkExternal junction+realpath","external+auto throw","importProject 복사"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: CliSpawn — cwd 강제
tasks.description:
**Goal:** runCli 래퍼 — cwd 필수, env 병합, Windows resolve.

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/cli-spawn.ts, __tests__/cli-spawn.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test -- cli-spawn` (5 tests)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/cli-spawn.ts","tools/cli-smoke/__tests__/cli-spawn.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test -- cli-spawn","acceptanceCriteria":["cwd 미지정 throw","cwd 미존재 throw","env 병합","node -v 성공"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: ClaudePermissionAdapter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §7.6.3 Claude — auto(+Bash)/hybrid(-Bash)/approval + allowedTools 화이트리스트.

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/permission-adapter.ts, __tests__/permission-adapter.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test -- permission-adapter` (Claude 4 tests)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/permission-adapter.ts","tools/cli-smoke/__tests__/permission-adapter.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test -- permission-adapter","acceptanceCriteria":["auto: Bash 포함","hybrid: Bash 제외","approval: default+최소 도구","external+auto throw"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: CodexPermissionAdapter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §7.6.3 Codex — auto(-a never +sandbox danger)/hybrid(--full-auto)/approval(on-failure+workspace-write).

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/permission-adapter.ts, __tests__/permission-adapter.test.ts (수정)

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test -- permission-adapter` (8 tests)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/permission-adapter.ts","tools/cli-smoke/__tests__/permission-adapter.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test -- permission-adapter","acceptanceCriteria":["auto: danger-full-access","hybrid: --full-auto","approval: on-failure workspace-write","read-only sandbox"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: GeminiPermissionAdapter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §7.6.3 Gemini — auto(yolo)/hybrid(auto_edit)/approval(default).

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/permission-adapter.ts, __tests__/permission-adapter.test.ts (수정)

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test -- permission-adapter` (12 tests)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/permission-adapter.ts","tools/cli-smoke/__tests__/permission-adapter.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test -- permission-adapter","acceptanceCriteria":["auto: yolo","hybrid: auto_edit","approval: default","external+auto throw"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Smoke Matrix Runner
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 3 CLI × 3 mode × (new/external) 매트릭스 실행 orchestration. 결과 JSON.

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/src/smoke-runner.ts

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit -p tools/cli-smoke/tsconfig.json` (실행은 Task 13)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/src/smoke-runner.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx tsc --noEmit -p tools/cli-smoke/tsconfig.json","acceptanceCriteria":["18+ 시나리오 orchestration","CLI 미설치 skip","결과 JSON 저장","external TOCTOU 재검증"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: 매트릭스 실행 + appendix 생성
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `npm run smoke:run` 실제 실행 → appendix-cli-matrix.md 작성 → spec §15 링크 추가.

**Files:** docs/specs/appendix/cli-matrix.md, docs/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (수정)

**Verify:** 매트릭스 JSON 저장됨 + appendix 존재

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/specs/appendix/cli-matrix.md","docs/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md","tools/cli-smoke/matrix-results/"],"verifyCommand":"ls tools/cli-smoke/matrix-results/ && test -f docs/specs/appendix/cli-matrix.md","acceptanceCriteria":["매트릭스 러너 실행 완료","JSON 결과 저장","appendix 마크다운 작성","spec §15 링크 추가"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: R1 종료 확인 + R2 체크리스트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 전체 test/typecheck/lint pass, 매트릭스 1회 이상 성공, README에 R2 진입 체크리스트.

**Files:** tools/cli-smoke/README.md (수정)

**Verify:** `npm run smoke:test && npm run typecheck && npm run lint` (exit 0)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/cli-smoke/README.md"],"verifyCommand":"npm run smoke:test && npm run typecheck && npm run lint","acceptanceCriteria":["모든 단위 테스트 통과","typecheck 통과","lint 통과","R2 체크리스트 문서"]}
```
